classes.optional: can be useful but is not required
classes.reflex: useful only after a defined precondition / previous result
classes.low_value: technically possible but low clinical/didactic value
classes.misleading: points in the wrong diagnostic direction
classes.invalid: not feasible or incompatible with material/question

visibility.assessment: show method-rule classification only after completion
visibility.instructor: show classification and scoring logic immediately

global_policy.met_handling: MET remains an add-on type rather than a fourth main simulator domain.
